name: SomeIpRemoveEventConsumer
title: SomeIpRemoveEventConsumer
description: Removes an Event from a Consumed Service Instance. The Event was previously added by SomeIpCreateEventConsumer.
Afterwards, the callback registered with SomeIpCreateEventConsumer is no longer called.

parameters.name: cevHandle
parameters.description: Handle of the Event to be removed (see SomeIpCreateEventConsumer).
